product.name: auaua Case for iPad Air 13 inch M4/M3/M2(2026/2025/2024), with Pencil Holder and Pocket, Multiple Viewing Angles, Magnetic Closure, Auto Sleep/Wake (Brown)
features: Compatibility: Designed for iPad Air 13-inch (M4) 2026; iPad Air 13-inch (M3) 2025 Release(Model: A3268/A3269/A3271); iPad Air 13-inch (M2) 2024 Release (Model: A2898/A2899/A2900)
Durability: High-quality materials; shock-absorbing design; soft interior lining; effectively cushion impacts; providing long-lasting protection for your device

Convenient Pocket: The pocket on the front of the case provides a secure space to store essential items such as notes, business cards, credit cards, letters or receipts, keeping them easily accessible when you need them
Viewing Angle: Anti-slip grooves; adjustable horizontal stand angles; free your hands for work or entertainment
Ergonomic Typing Angle: Allowing for a more natural wrist posture and minimizing discomfort during long typing sessions
Magnetic Closure: Supports automatic sleep/wake function; helps conserve battery life and extend the battery standby time
